housing.title: Remodeler confidence slips but remains positive, NAHB reports
housing.what: NAHB's RMI slipped to a reading of 62 in Q1 2026, with current conditions at 70 and future indicators at 54, above the expansion threshold.
housing.why: Supply pipeline sets future inventory and construction activity.
housing.market: Stronger pipeline aids suppliers; oversupply later can weigh on pricing.

housing.title: A Record 34% of February Home Sellers Cut Their List Price

notables.title: Milwaukee’s Luvene Realty Group moves to Compass from Keller Williams
notables.what: Shauny Luvene’s nine-agent team joins Compass in Milwaukee, moving from Keller Williams after 106.4 sides and $21.26M in volume in 2024.
